item.title: Was Jackie Kennedy or Carolyn Bessette Kennedy's Engagement Ring More Expensive? Comparing Their Stunning Sparklers
item.description: Carolyn Bessette Kennedy's engagement ring was inspired by a piece from Jackie Kennedy's jewelry collection

item.title: Jennifer Garner Says She Gets Bangs Instead of Botox, but Refuses to Promise Her Kids She Won’t Get a Facelift
item.description: Garner opened up about her past tweaks and potential future procedures while speaking with Kylie Kelce on her 'Not Gonna Lie' podcast

item.title: How Did Gene Hackman and His Wife Die? A Look Back at Their Tragic Deaths and the Questions That Remain Unanswered 1 Year Later
item.description: In February 2025, Gene Hackman and his wife, Betsy, were found dead inside their New Mexico home

item.title: Ethan Hawke Recalls 'Hours' Spent Memorizing a 'Staggering Amount' of Lines for “Blue Moon”: 'Broke My Brain' (Exclusive)
item.description: The star has received his fifth Oscar nomination for playing the real-life Lorenz Hart in the Richard Linklater film

item.title: What Happened to Jackie Kennedy's Fifth Avenue Apartment? All About the $32 Million Penthouse
item.description: Jackie Kennedy purchased the top-floor apartment at 1040 Fifth Avenue in 1964 for $200,000
